nodes.name: doc_audit
nodes.summary: Documentation audit module inspired by Valknut. Checks for missing docstrings, stale docstrings, missing module docs, and counts TODO/FIXME/HACK comments as code smell indicators.

nodes.name: duplication
nodes.summary: Code duplication detection using token-based sliding window hashing (CPD-style). Tokenizes Python and text files, hashes windows of N tokens, and finds collisions to identify copy-paste bugs.

nodes.name: extra_rules
nodes.summary: Expanded security rules supplementing multi_lang.py with additional crypto, XSS, injection, and framework-specific patterns across Python, JavaScript, Go, Java, and C++.

nodes.name: feedback
nodes.summary: Feedback loop package that tracks per-layer precision/recall and captures escaped bugs. Exports StatsTracker and RuleCapture.

nodes.name: rule_capture
nodes.summary: Captures escaped bugs by generating Semgrep rule templates. When a bug escapes to production, creates a YAML rule file that L0 Semgrep will catch on future commits.

nodes.name: stats
nodes.summary: Per-layer precision/recall tracking that feeds into the IT2-FIS as source_reliability signal. Layers with high false-positive rates get downweighted; layers catching real bugs get upweighted.

nodes.name: ffi_analyzer
nodes.summary: Full cross-language FFI boundary analyzer inspired by i-CodeCNES. Detects type mismatches, buffer overflows, memory management errors, GIL violations, reference counting issues, and dangerous C function calls at the Python-to-C boundary via ctypes/cffi/pybind11/Cython.

nodes.name: flawfinder_db
nodes.summary: Curated database of dangerous C/C++ functions inspired by Flawfinder. Each function entry has risk level (1-5), CWE, explanation, and safer alternative for use by the FIS aggregation layer.

nodes.name: hotspots
nodes.summary: Security hotspot review workflow with tamper-evident audit trail. Tracks hotspots through detection, review, and time-decay re-review cycles with cryptographic chaining for compliance.

nodes.name: html_scanner
nodes.summary: HTML/config security scanner that detects missing CSP headers, hardcoded secrets in .env files, security misconfigs in build configs, and devtools in production package.json.

nodes.name: iac_scanner
nodes.summary: Infrastructure as Code scanner covering Terraform, Dockerfile, Kubernetes, CloudFormation, Helm, and Pulumi. Detects misconfigurations like public S3 buckets, open security groups, and privileged containers.

nodes.name: impact_analysis
nodes.summary: Impact analysis inspired by gossiphs. Builds a call graph from AST, computes blast radius for changed functions (direct/transitive callers), and identifies affected test files.

nodes.name: incremental
nodes.summary: Incremental scanning engine with file-level content-hash caching, Python import dependency tracking, differential analysis, watch mode, and parallel scanning via ProcessPoolExecutor.

nodes.name: installer
nodes.summary: Tool auto-installer that downloads and installs external tools (gitleaks, semgrep, opa, kani, mutmut, atheris) with SHA256 verification. Supports Python pip tools and Go/Rust binary downloads.

nodes.name: interprocedural
nodes.summary: Advanced interprocedural taint analysis engine combining function summary generation, cross-file call resolution, branch constraint tracking, and trace caching. Supports Python, JavaScript, Go, Java, and C/C++.

nodes.name: issue_store
nodes.summary: SQLite-backed issue store for finding lifecycle and trend tracking. Tracks issue states (open/confirmed/fixed/wontfix/baselined), history, and trend data for stca trend reporting.

nodes.name: js_cpg
nodes.summary: JavaScript/TypeScript Code Property Graph for cross-file taint tracking using tree-sitter. Detects XSS, eval injection, and command injection across JS/TS/JSX/TSX files with source/sink detection.

nodes.name: js_multiline
nodes.summary: Multi-line pattern matcher for JS/TS files using re.DOTALL. Catches 12 patterns that span multiple lines (token before role check, async issues, etc.) that line-based scanners miss.

nodes.name: js_pattern_scanner
nodes.summary: Dedicated JavaScript/TypeScript regex-based pattern scanner for JSX/TSX files where semgrep has known issues. Covers 20+ audit findings including hardcoded keys, JWT in localStorage, and XSS patterns.

nodes.name: js_quality
nodes.summary: JS code quality analyzer computing cyclomatic complexity, toxicity scores, Halstead volume, nesting depth, parameter count, and file health grades without requiring a JS parser.

nodes.name: jsx_auth
nodes.summary: JSX-aware authorization extraction for React/Next.js codebases. Detects HOC patterns, hooks, component wrappers, permission checks, and route guards to find pages missing auth.

nodes.name: knowledge_base
nodes.summary: Builtin function behavior database inspired by Kunlun-M. Stores per-function taint metadata (passthrough, safe, source, sink) for interprocedural analysis across multiple languages.

nodes.name: layers
nodes.summary: Pipeline layers package. Imports and exports all analysis layers (L0-L7) and the ALL_LAYERS set for pipeline orchestration.

nodes.name: base
nodes.summary: Abstract base class for all pipeline layers. Defines the LayerBase interface with the run() method contract: given repo root, hunks, and config, return Findings. Layers are independent and idempotent.

nodes.name: l0_fast
nodes.summary: L0 Fast hooks layer running in under 5 seconds. Catches hardcoded secrets (gitleaks or regex fallback), Python lint errors (ruff), and SAST patterns (semgrep or built-in mini-ruleset). Catches ~25% of real bugs without LLM.

nodes.name: CFunctionSignature
nodes.summary: Data class representing a parsed C function signature with name, return type, parameters, source file, variadic flag, and header file reference.

nodes.name: FFICall
nodes.summary: Data class representing a detected FFI call from Python to C with library, function name, arguments, inferred types, and return value tracking.

nodes.name: CExtensionSource
nodes.summary: Data class for analyzed C extension source files tracking PyInit presence, PyObject usage, GIL operations, and reference count operations.

nodes.name: FFIViolation
nodes.summary: Data class for FFI boundary violations with type, severity, location, C function context, description, fix suggestion, and CWE reference.

nodes.name: FFIUsageDetector
nodes.summary: Scans Python files for FFI calls via ctypes, cffi, pybind11, and Cython. Parses AST to extract call signatures, library references, arguments, and return type tracking.

nodes.name: CHeaderParser
nodes.summary: Parses C header files to extract function signatures. Uses regex to match function declarations and infer parameter types for cross-language type checking.

nodes.name: CExtensionAnalyzer
nodes.summary: Analyzes C extension source files (.c, .cpp, .pyx) for GIL usage patterns, reference counting operations, and PyInit entry points.

nodes.name: FFIViolationDetector
nodes.summary: Detects 10 categories of FFI violations: type mismatches, null pointers, dangerous C functions, missing error checking, string encoding, buffer size, signed/unsigned mismatch, GIL violations, refcount imbalance, and memory management issues.

nodes.name: run
nodes.summary: Main entry point for L0 fast scanning. Orchestrates gitleaks, ruff, and semgrep execution with fallback regex patterns when tools are not installed.
